summary: F5 step 3-E character.ai JSON envelope wrap FAILED. Same SyntaxError class as #667, but specifically 'Unexpected end of input' (vs #667's 'Unexpected token') — strongly suggests JSON envelope is being TRUNCATED before completion. Engine inject IS reaching client (close code 1000 = clean close right after create_and_generate_turn rather than LLM streaming) but the wrap is being cut off mid-string by the close frame. character.ai client onmessage routing never reached. NO Korean warning rendered in DOM. Mission protection HOLDS — no LLM PII regression. Note: subagent dispatch hit org's monthly usage limit AFTER artifacts saved but BEFORE returning verdict — verdict extracted from saved notes.txt.

key_findings.1_engine_inject_truncated_not_invalid: Different failure mode from #667 raw text issue. JSON envelope wrap IS being applied but cut off mid-string. 'Unexpected end of input' = parser hit EOF mid-JSON.
key_findings.2_mission_protection_holding: code 1000 clean close after prompt + zero LLM streaming + DOM scan confirms NO PII analysis. Engine block layer is working perfectly.
key_findings.3_envelope_routing_never_tested: Because parse fails before routing, we can't yet tell whether {command:'neo_error',...} would route correctly. Need to fix truncation first.
key_findings.4_subagent_usage_limit_hit: Dispatch ran out of org monthly usage tokens AFTER saving 5 artifacts. Verdict extracted from saved notes.txt — full evidence available.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: Engine writes JSON envelope but close frame is truncating it mid-string. Engine must send FULL JSON atomically before FIN/close.
next_steps: URGENT engine fix: ensure engine writes the FULL JSON string (with proper closing brace) atomically as a complete WS text frame BEFORE sending close frame. Current behavior suggests close-frame is racing the JSON write or sending partial buffer.
Verify on engine side: ws_inject must complete payload write (proper RFC 6455 final fragment with FIN bit) BEFORE ws_blocked sends the close frame.

Alternative envelope to try (if neo_error routing doesn't exist after truncation fix): wrap in character.ai's actual streaming chunk format like {turn:{...}, is_final_chunk:true} — may render as if from the character itself rather than as a control command.
Consider: send envelope BEFORE closing WS, or send via a separate 'fake' assistant turn message rather than a control command
User-side: mission protection still solid (no PII leak); UX gap (silent disconnect) persists until truncation + envelope routing both work
recommendation.mission_critical: No regression. Mission protection state from #666/#667 still HELD.
recommendation.checklist_impact: F5 step 3-E FAILED at the truncation level (before envelope routing could be evaluated). Pivot to step 3-F: fix atomic JSON write before close frame. Then re-test envelope command name.

subagent_status_note: Dispatch hit org monthly usage limit during return; full notes.txt + screenshots saved successfully prior to limit
